headerDisplay: Homebridge platform plugin for ECO Plugs and WION Wi-Fi switches by KAB. Supports the legacy FtNetManager protocol (ports 25/5888) and the newer KABNetManager protocol (port 9090/10228) with full local-only control.

defaultServiceType.title: Default Service Type
defaultServiceType.description: HomeKit service to expose for devices when not overridden per-device.

name.title: Name
name.description: Plugin name as displayed in the Homebridge log

port.title: Incoming UDP Port
port.description: UDP port Homebridge listens on for legacy device status messages.

localOnly.title: Local Network Only
localOnly.description: When enabled, only private LAN addresses are used for discovery and control. Strongly recommended.

pollingInterval.title: Status Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often to poll devices for status. Use 0 to disable. Default: 10

kabCommandTimeoutMs.title: KAB Command Timeout (ms)
kabCommandTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds to wait for KAB command responses. Increase if your network is slow.

kabBindPort.title: KAB Source Bind Port
kabBindPort.description: UDP source port to bind for KAB commands. Set to 0 for an ephemeral port if your device only replies to non-9090 ports.

kabMaxFailures.title: KAB Max Consecutive Failures
kabMaxFailures.description: After this many consecutive status timeouts the plugin will stop querying the device (periodic polling applies only to legacy devices) until a successful response or discovery resets the counter.

kabSkipBeaconAck.title: Skip Beacon ACK
kabSkipBeaconAck.description: Do not send the 36‑byte acknowledgment packet when a KAB beacon is received. Some firmware versions misinterpret the ACK as a command and toggle the outlet; enable this to prevent that.

debug.title: Enable Plugin Debug
debug.description: Show verbose KAB/legacy protocol logs without running Homebridge in debug mode.

kabDiscoveryAttempts.title: KAB Discovery Attempts
kabDiscoveryAttempts.description: How many discovery probe packets to send when performing KAB discovery.

discoverInterval.title: Discovery Interval (seconds)
discoverInterval.description: How often to re-run legacy broadcast discovery. KAB devices beacon continuously. Default: 60

deviceInactiveTimeout.title: Inactive Device Timeout (seconds)
deviceInactiveTimeout.description: Mark device unresponsive after this many seconds without a reply. 0 = never. Default: 180

deviceRemoveTimeout.title: Remove Device Timeout (seconds)
deviceRemoveTimeout.description: Remove device from Homebridge after this many seconds without a reply. 0 = never. Default: 0

devices.title: Per-Device Configuration
devices.description: Manually specify devices by IP address, or override KAB protocol credentials. Useful for KAB devices (port 9090) with static IPs.

serviceType.title: Service Type
serviceType.description: Override the HomeKit service for this device (default inherits from platform setting).

host.title: IP Address
host.description: Static IP address of the device. Set this to connect immediately without waiting for a device beacon on port 10228.

commandPort.title: Command Port
commandPort.description: Command port override (default: 9090 for KAB, 80 for legacy)

kabKey.title: KAB Credential Key
kabKey.description: 8-character credential key from the device (auto-populated from beacon normally; only needed for static-IP devices before first beacon)

protocol.title: Protocol
protocol.description: Force a specific protocol; leave as 'auto' to let the plugin decide
